# popupPopover

**Instance Property**

A popover that presents a web view loaded with the pop-up page for this action, or `nil` if no popup is specified.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var popupPopover: NSPopover? { get }
```

## Discussion

This popover contains a view controller with a web view preloaded with the pop-up page. It automatically adjusts its size to fit the web view’s content size. The [doc://com.apple.webkit/documentation/WebKit/WKWebExtension/Action/presentsPopup] property should be checked to determine the availability of a pop-up before using this property.  Dismissing the popover will close the pop-up and unload the web view.

## Related Documentation

- **presentsPopup**: A Boolean value indicating whether the action has a pop-up.
